title: tribrachia biflora
intro: Tribrachia biflora, also known as the two-flowered tribrachia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tribrachia biflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Tribrachia biflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
